name: Giulio Beakolini
description: Giulio Beakolini, known as the Duce, is the charismatic and fanatical leader of Wingbardy, whose dream of reviving the Great Kartinian Empire became the foundation of his dictatorship. Rising from poverty, he fashioned himself into a symbol of national rebirth, merging military might, cultural conservatism, and ruthless rhetoric.
creator: Jason S.
